mapper.select:
SELECT sub.dd, sub.total, sub.outCnt, ROUND(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.outCnt * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS per FROM ( SELECT AS dd, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN co.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outCnt FROM CARD_INPUT ci LEFT JOIN CARD_OUTPUT co ON ci.TSTM_YMD = co.TSTM_YMD AND ci.TSTM_NO = co.TSTM_NO AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD
GROUP BY dd ) sub

SELECT sub.dd, sub.total, sub.hitCnt1, sub.hitCnt2, sub.hitCnt3, ROUND(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt1 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt1Per, ROUND(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt2 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt2Per, ROUND(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt3 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt3Per FROM ( SELECT AS dd, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN co.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(ci.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON, co.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt1, SUM(CASE WHEN co.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(ci.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, CONCAT(co.BRCD, '-', co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt2, SUM(CASE WHEN co.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(ci.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON, TRIM(co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt3 FROM CARD_OUTPUT ci INNER JOIN CARD_LEARNING_DATA co ON ci.TSTM_YMD = co.TSTM_YMD AND ci.TSTM_NO = co.TSTM_NO AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD
GROUP BY dd ) sub

SELECT sub.dd, sub.total, sub.outCnt, ROUND(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.outCnt * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS per FROM( SELECT AS dd, count(*) AS total, sum(CASE WHEN co.BASE_YM IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outCnt FROM BILL_INPUT ci LEFT JOIN BILL_OUTPUT co ON ci.TXBL_SRN = co.TXBL_SRN AND ci.BASE_YM = co.BASE_YM AND ci.TXBL_SRN = co.TXBL_SRN
GROUP BY dd ) sub

SELECT sub.dd, sub.total, sub.hitCnt1, sub.hitCnt2, sub.hitCnt3, ROUND(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt1 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt1Per, ROUND(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt2 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt2Per, ROUND(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt3 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt3Per FROM ( SELECT AS dd, count(*) AS total, sum(CASE WHEN co.BASE_YM IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(ci.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_PRB_CON, co.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt1, sum(CASE WHEN co.BASE_YM IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(ci.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_PRB_CON, concat(co.BRCD, '-', co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt2, sum(CASE WHEN co.BASE_YM IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(ci.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_PRB_CON, TRIM(co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt3 FROM BILL_OUTPUT ci INNER JOIN BILL_LEARNING_DATA co ON ci.BASE_YM = co.BASE_YM AND ci.TXBL_SRN = co.TXBL_SRN AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD
GROUP BY dd ) sub

when.test: searchCycle == null or searchCycle == '' or searchCycle == 1
